title: coronilla rostrata var. pauciflora
intro: Coronilla rostrata var. pauciflora, also known as the few-flowered crown anemone or coronilla, is a flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural diuretic. Coronilla rostrata var. pauciflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
